requirement_topic.zh: 消防安全与安装规范 — AS/NZS 5139:2019
requirement_topic.zht: 消防安全與安裝規範 — AS/NZS 5139:2019

summary.en: AS/NZS 5139:2019 (Electrical Installations — Safety of Battery Systems for Use with Power Conversion Equipment) is the primary Australian installation standard for BESS. It mandates specific requirements for installation clearances, ventilation, signage, battery management system performance, emergency procedures, and documentation. The National Construction Code (NCC) fire provisions also apply to the building in which a BESS is installed; state and territory fire regulations may impose additional requirements. Installation must be carried out or supervised by a licensed electrician, and the completed installation must be inspected and certified. Any modifications to an existing BESS installation must also comply with AS/NZS 5139.
summary.zh: AS/NZS 5139:2019（电气装置——与电力转换设备配套使用的蓄电池系统安全）是澳大利亚 BESS 安装的主要标准，规定了安装间隙、通风、标识、电池管理系统性能、应急程序及文档的具体要求。《国家建筑规范》（NCC）消防条款同样适用于安装 BESS 的建筑物；州和领地消防法规可能附加额外要求。安装须由持证电工负责或监督，竣工安装须经检查和认证。对现有 BESS 安装的任何改动亦须符合 AS/NZS 5139。
summary.zht: AS/NZS 5139:2019（電氣裝置——與電力轉換設備配套使用的蓄電池系統安全）是澳洲 BESS 安裝的主要標準，規定了安裝間隙、通風、標識、電池管理系統性能、應急程序及文件的具體要求。《國家建築規範》（NCC）消防條款同樣適用於安裝 BESS 的建築物；州和領地消防法規可能附加額外要求。安裝須由持牌電工負責或監督，竣工安裝須經檢查和認證。對現有 BESS 安裝的任何改動亦須符合 AS/NZS 5139。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS 5139:2019 — Electrical Installations — Safety of Battery Systems for Use with Power Conversion Equipment
National Construction Code (NCC) — fire provisions applicable to building containing BESS
State and territory electrical safety and fire regulations

summary.en: China's GB 36276-2023 (Safety Requirements for Lithium-Ion Battery for Electrical Energy Storage) covers product-level safety and includes some installation safety provisions. GB 51048-2014 (Design Code for Electrochemical Energy Storage Station) is the mandatory Chinese design code for utility-scale electrochemical energy storage stations, including spatial layout, ventilation, and fire suppression. However, neither standard is directly equivalent to AS/NZS 5139:2019 in scope or regulatory layer — GB 51048 addresses facility design for large-scale stations while AS/NZS 5139 applies to all battery system installations including residential and commercial.
summary.zh: 中国 GB 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子蓄电池安全要求）涵盖产品级安全并包含部分安装安全条款。GB 51048-2014（电化学储能电站设计规范）是中国适用于大型电化学储能电站的强制性设计规范，涵盖空间布局、通风及消防系统。然而，上述标准在适用范围或监管层级上均与 AS/NZS 5139:2019 不直接等同——GB 51048 针对大型电站的设施设计，而 AS/NZS 5139 适用于包括住宅和商业在内的所有电池系统安装。
summary.zht: 中國 GB 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子蓄電池安全要求）涵蓋產品級安全並包含部分安裝安全條款。GB 51048-2014（電化學儲能電站設計規範）是中國適用於大型電化學儲能電站的強制性設計規範，涵蓋空間佈局、通風及消防系統。然而，上述標準在適用範圍或監管層級上均與 AS/NZS 5139:2019 不直接等同——GB 51048 針對大型電站的設施設計，而 AS/NZS 5139 適用於包括住宅和商業在內的所有電池系統安裝。

standards_or_laws: GB 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子蓄电池 (Safety requirements for lithium-ion battery for electrical energy storage)
GB 51048-2014 — Design Code for Electrochemical Energy Storage Station (mandatory code)

gap.en: AS/NZS 5139:2019 mandates specific installation clearances, ventilation calculations, mandatory signage, and emergency procedures that are not required or defined in the same way by GB 36276 or GB 51048. A building certifier or licensed electrician must sign off on the installation to AS/NZS 5139 — no equivalent self-declaration or factory approval process applies. State and territory fire regulations may additionally restrict BESS placement relative to buildings and property boundaries beyond what AS/NZS 5139 prescribes. Chinese BESS exporters must engage Australian-licensed electricians and ensure installation documentation meets AS/NZS 5139 requirements.
gap.zh: AS/NZS 5139:2019 对安装间隙、通风计算、强制性标识及应急程序提出了具体要求，GB 36276 或 GB 51048 对此均无相同方式的规定。建筑认证人员或持证电工须对安装进行签认以符合 AS/NZS 5139——不适用等效的自声明或工厂审批流程。州和领地消防法规可能在 AS/NZS 5139 规定之外，对 BESS 相对建筑物和地产边界的位置附加限制。中国 BESS 出口商须聘用澳大利亚持证电工，并确保安装文件符合 AS/NZS 5139 要求。
gap.zht: AS/NZS 5139:2019 對安裝間隙、通風計算、強制性標識及應急程序提出了具體要求，GB 36276 或 GB 51048 對此均無相同方式的規定。建築認證人員或持牌電工須對安裝進行簽認以符合 AS/NZS 5139——不適用等效的自聲明或工廠審批流程。州和領地消防法規可能在 AS/NZS 5139 規定之外，對 BESS 相對建築物和地產邊界的位置附加限制。中國 BESS 出口商須聘用澳洲持牌電工，並確保安裝文件符合 AS/NZS 5139 要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — AS/NZS 5139:2019 is the mandatory installation standard for battery systems in Australia; NCC fire provisions also apply; state/territory fire regulations may impose additional requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market — GB 36276 mandatory safety standard; GB 51048-2014 mandatory design code for utility-scale electrochemical energy storage stations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese BESS products intended for installation in Australia must comply with AS/NZS 5139:2019 installation requirements. Compliance with Chinese GB installation standards alone is not sufficient. Installation must be completed and certified by a licensed electrician in accordance with AS/NZS 5139 and applicable state or territory regulations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 拟在澳大利亚安装的中国 BESS 产品须符合 AS/NZS 5139:2019 安装要求。仅符合中国 GB 安装标准不足以满足要求。安装须由持证电工按照 AS/NZS 5139 及适用的州或领地法规完成并取得认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 擬在澳洲安裝的中國 BESS 產品須符合 AS/NZS 5139:2019 安裝要求。僅符合中國 GB 安裝標準不足以滿足要求。安裝須由持牌電工按照 AS/NZS 5139 及適用的州或領地法規完成並取得認證。
